Revibe SQL Analysis

📌 Project Overview

This project is based on an e-commerce database called Revibe.
I used SQL to analyze sales and revenue data.

🧠 Key Concepts Used

* JOIN operations to combine multiple tables
* Aggregation using SUM()
* Filtering using WHERE clause
* GROUP BY for insights

📊 Key Analysis

* Calculated total revenue generated by each product
* Considered only delivered orders for accurate results

## 🛠️ Tools Used

* MySQL
* SQL

📁 Project Files

* schema.sql → contains table creation
* data.sql → contains inserted data
* analysis.sql → contains SQL queries

🚀 Outcome

This project helped me understand how real-world e-commerce data is analyzed using SQL.
